steps.t: The bloodstone trove is in the fortress of Tór Gailvin north-east of Aughaire, probably hidden in an out-of-the-way corner. Latharna has asked you to …
Latharna is in the Búth Sánkhas in Aughaire, south-east of the market. You have recovered the bloodstone trove from Tór Gailvin and should bring it no…
